answers.contents:
中国、朝鲜、俄罗斯、日本（有争议）。
荷兰、捷克、爱沙尼亚的无神论占优，但仍有20%-30%的人口是基督徒，且spiritual but not religious的人口比较多，所以不算进去。
其中需要注明：俄罗斯人的主体已经失去了他们的信仰，他们加入一个教会不过是为了像中国人加入共青团或共产党一样获得政治地位和展示爱国精神
日本虽然主体由非宗教的人口组成，但我怀疑spiritual but not religious的人口非常之多，另外一方面，日本文化教育我们，任何事物都有值得尊重的地方，一般的日本人不会因为一个人的宗教信仰而贬低这个人，觉得ta没有受充分的教育。

https://en.m.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_countries_by_irreligion

数据不见得准，不过可以参考。捷克南韩中国日本都挺高的。
挪威是世界上无神论占比最多的国家，丹麦，芬兰的无神论者也占大多数。

discussions.content:
The information I got from the Internet is different from your interpretation.
Religion in Norway is dominated by Lutheran Christianity, with 63.7% of the population belonging to the Evangelical Lutheran Church of Norway in 2022. The Catholic Church is the next largest Christian church at 3.1%. The unaffiliated make up 18.3% of the population. Islam is followed by 3.4% of the population.
Approximately 85% of the Danish population is Evangelical Lutheran, 3% are Roman Catholic, and approximately 5% of the population is Muslim.
According to Finnish government statistics from December 2021 that count only registered members of registered congregations, 66.6 percent of the population belong to the Evangelical Lutheran Church of Finland (ELC) and 1.1 percent to the Finnish Orthodox Church, while 0.4 percent (approximately 21,000) have official membership in Islamic congregations, and 30.5 percent do not identify as belonging to any religious group.

answers.contents: 韩国和捷克都是无神论者占全国人口一多半的国家

没有真正的无神论国家，一神教是所有现代国家的必然上层建筑。中国政府的合法性也是利用马克思主义作为无法证伪的唯一神而存在

如果单纯以人格化神来评判的话，所有佛教国家都是无神论

discussions.content: atheism有现成定义，不用你自己瞎编。
